text:
/ci1 1 過大評価にも程があるな。
三人分の力があるかも怪しいが……
今は貴重な戦力だ。蹴散らすぞ。

/ci1 2 真顔でサボろうとするな。
我々の役目は陽動だ、休む暇などない。
お前たちは先へ行け。健闘を祈る。

二人揃って
無様な姿をさらしてしまうとはな……
すまない、我々は離脱する。

すまない……
これ以上の戦闘続行は不可能だ。
……離脱する。

ふむ……致し方ない。
だが、カトリの離脱は想定の範囲内だ。
引き続き、任務を続行する。

/ci1 1 Talk about a grave overestimation.
I doubt she's worth even three soldiers...
But she's still a valuable asset. Let's get them.

/ci1 2 Don't slack off there with your game face on.
Our job is to distract, there's no time for rest.
You lot go on ahead. I wish you luck.

That really was a less than stellar
performance from the both of us...
Sorry, but we'll be taking our leave.

Apologies...
I can't go on fighting any longer.
...I must take my leave.

Hmph... I suppose it was inevitable.
Katori's retreat was well within expectations.
I'll continue on with the mission.
